title: Effective date of modification or termination of a judgment of interdiction
doc_html:
Art. 398.  Effective date of modification or termination of a judgment of interdiction

An order modifying or terminating a judgment of interdiction is effective on the date signed by the court.

Acts 2000, 1st Ex. Sess., No. 25, §1, eff. July 1, 2001.
